title: Get the Glow Back: 11 Herbal Creams for Teenagers with Oily Face
description: Melaleuca alternifolia creams are a popular choice for managing oily faces due to their active ingredient, tea tree oil. This essential oil contains compounds like cineole and terpinen-4-ol, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria that can clog pores and cause oiliness. Cineole, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of sebum, a key contributor to oily skin. If you're looking to use Melaleuca alt...
